{{Quote|You get a G-2RD droid going, and you'll have to take its head off to stop it.|Han Solo|<ref name="TLC">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
The '''G-2RD Series Guard Droid''' was a small, fourth-degree defense [[Droid/Legends|droid]]<ref name="CFTD">''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]''</ref> built by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]]. The spherical, flat, black security droid had three evenly-spaced arms, sensor antennae studding its bottom, and multiple [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]] surrounding its surface. The G-2RD could manipulate locks and speak, read, and write [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]].<ref name="Arms and Equipment Guide" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:G-2RD.jpg|thumb|left|250px|G-2RD]]
G-2RD droids were designed by Arakyd to be tenacious and uncompromising, providing security while preventing rioting. While Arakyd thought this was a plus, many other droids and individuals found them to be annoying and hard to work with. Initially, Arakyd sold the G-2RD series to prison facilities throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was equipped with a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift engine]] that gave it a flight ceiling of 900 [[Meter/Legends|meters]].<ref name="EGD" />

To aid in its task to stop rioters and/or escapees without killing them, the droid was equipped with a [[Stun baton/Legends|stun baton]], an [[Ion blaster/Legends|ion blaster]], and a [[Stun grenade/Legends|stun grenade]] launcher. Defensively, it was protected by a thick armor and an immunity to standard [[Restraining bolt/Legends|restraining bolts]]. Furthermore, it has a loud alarm system, which could call help from distant areas.

By the end of production, Arakyd had produced millions of the droids, who worked in places from the armies of petty criminals to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] detention blocks.<ref name="Arms and Equipment Guide" />

==History==
Since its [[Declaration of a New Order|formation]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] purchased large numbers of these security droids.<ref name="Arms and Equipment Guide" />

[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] briefly encountered one and was able to disable it with a jury-rigged a restraining bolt that overcame the droid's defenses. In turn, the droid's memory was erased.<ref name="TLC" />
